message:
Running command: 
# b18,b19,b20 - 32 SRAM banks total, ~20/32 done. STA almost complete.
# Continue monitoring.

RUN_DIR="/workspace/nc-project-20260529-210526/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu/openlane/mspm33c321a_derivative_mcu_wrapper/runs/wrapper_run"

for i in $(seq 1 1000); do
    sleep 30
    FILL_LOG=$(wc -c < /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>/dev/null)
    LATEST_MSG=$(tail -3 /tmp/librelane_fill.log 2>/dev/null | tr '\n' ' ' | cut -c1-120)
    FINAL=$([ -d "$RUN_DIR/final" ] && echo "FINAL!" || echo "no")
    STEP=$(ls "$RUN_DIR/" | sort -V | grep "^[0-9]" | tail -1)
    PROCS=$(ps aux | grep -E "(openroad|librelane|magic)" | grep -v grep | wc -l)
    
    echo "[$i $(date +%H:%M:%S)] LOG=${FILL_LOG}B FINAL=$FINAL STEP=$STEP PROCS=$PROCS | $LATEST_MSG"
    [ "$FINAL" != "no" ] && echo "=== FLOW COMPLETE ===" && break
    [ "$PROCS" = "0" ] && echo "All processes done!" && break
done

function.name: execute_bash
